chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Misc: Appeal No.30 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For order on C.M.A No.1470/2025 3. For hearing of main case 07.11.2025 This Miscellaneous Appeal was filed on 14.12.2024. Thereafter, it was listed on 06.08.2024, 15.10.2025, 24.10.2025, 31.10.2025 and once again today, i.e., 07.11.2025. None has appeared on behalf of the appellant since its institution, nor has any intimation been received. It appears that the appellant has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly, this appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
